title: Dividend Champions To Buy, Sell And Hold, Part 7
text: Dividend Champions are a great list of stocks to study for long-term investment options. Five years ago, I wrote a series of articles in which I reviewed Dividend Champions from specific industries to determine which stocks are buys, sells, or holds.

title: Illinois Tool Works' Outperformance Can Continue
text: In the last quarter, Illinois Tool Works reported an organic growth rate between mid-teens and mid-20s percentage in 5 out of 7 segments, driven by healthy demand in the end market. The demand across the industrial sector remained strong, while consumer-related demand was down.

title: The 1 Key Metric Investors Should Watch for Every Stock
text: Why you should favor buying stocks with rising profit margins.

title: Bert's October Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $801.63 in October dividend income. This was the first quarter we received a dividend from Vanguard's S&P 500 Index fund (VOO).
